name: Shaeel Afsar
title: Frontend Engineer & Product-Focused Software Developer
summary: Frontend-leaning software engineer building performant, content-rich web products with Next.js, TypeScript, and thoughtful product systems. I enjoy pairing strong UX craft with pragmatic architecture, clear documentation, and reliable delivery.

experience.summary: Partner with founders and small teams to design, build, and ship modern web platforms with a focus on product clarity, performance, and maintainable frontends.
highlights: Delivered marketing, portfolio, and SaaS surfaces in Next.js with accessible component systems and reusable content models.
Defined design-token foundations, motion patterns, and page-building primitives that reduced implementation churn across launches.
Improved Lighthouse scores, perceived load time, and authoring workflows by simplifying data fetching and content publishing paths.

experience.summary: Built polished product experiences for client engagements spanning dashboards, marketing sites, and editorial content systems.
highlights: Implemented component-driven design systems that supported shared patterns across multiple product teams and campaigns.
Shipped high-trust contact, onboarding, and conversion flows with strong validation, analytics hooks, and responsive behavior.
Collaborated with designers to translate wireframes into production-ready interfaces while keeping motion subtle and performant.

experience.summary: Contributed across frontend and backend systems for internal tools and public-facing data products used by operations and policy teams.
highlights: Built React interfaces for search, filtering, and reporting workflows that made dense operational data easier to act on.
Created API integrations and background processing pipelines to synchronize datasets from third-party services.
Helped improve release reliability with stronger typing, CI checks, and clearer handoff documentation.

experience.summary: Designed and launched websites for individuals and small businesses, balancing visual polish, CMS practicality, and straightforward maintenance.
highlights: Created responsive marketing and portfolio sites with custom theming, content architecture, and SEO-friendly page structure.
Managed projects end-to-end, from discovery and prototyping through implementation, deployment, and iteration.
Established a durable foundation in client communication, estimation, and translating goals into shipped product decisions.

education.summary: Coursework emphasized software engineering, human-computer interaction, data structures, and web application development.
